headline: Incyte (INCY): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Incyte has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 8.6% to $114.25 per share while the index has gained 8.2%.
